title: ECIL is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: ECIL is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
ECIL, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ECIL:
ECIL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL!
